input.testCaseTitle: New NPI > ERP > Objective Others : Extra field is Showing.
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-362 reported defect: New NPI > ERP > Objective Others : Extra field is Showing.
input.errorMessage: New NPI > ERP > Objective Others : Extra field is Showing. — see CPI ticket CPI-362 for repro context (no description in source corpus)

groundTruth.rootCauseDetail: The Objective Others field was added as a requirements change rather than evidence of a runtime defect. The final dropdown includes If others with a text box, and comments say this was added per requirements and works as expected.
groundTruth.notesForEval: Numeric confidence 0.78. ui-regression is acceptable if Sherlock treats the extra field as visible form drift, but the comments read like accepted scope change.
